title: IELTS Writing grade output
description: Canonical shape of a single grading. The runtime validates the model's reply against this exact schema and repairs/rejects anything that does not conform. Maps 1:1 onto the gradings table.
disclaimer: This assessment is generated by an automated system. It is practice feedback only and is not affiliated with, authorised by, or endorsed by IELTS, the British Council, IDP: IELTS Australia, or Cambridge Assessment English. Band estimates are indicative and are not official IELTS results.

overall_band.description: Mean of the four criteria, rounded to the nearest 0.5 (round DOWN on ties).

band_with_fixes.description: Realistic band if the named fixes were applied. Must be >= overall_band.

annotations.description: OPTIONAL. Concrete, in-text mistakes for the marked-up-essay view. Each `text` MUST be an exact, short substring copied verbatim from the essay so the UI can locate and highlight it. Emit the most important ~30; never invent text that is not in the essay.

text.description: Exact verbatim substring from the essay (a few words).

note.description: One short line on why it's wrong / the rule.

what_caps_it.description: Why it is not the next band up (cite a taxonomy fault).
